home_html:
Software engineer, database architect, and published author building thoughtful systems for complex problems.

What I Do

  • AI Workflow Automation — Building intelligent tools that accelerate development
  • Database Architecture — Enterprise-scale data systems and stored procedure libraries
  • Web Applications — Full-stack platforms from dating apps to portfolio sites
  • Open Source — Shareware and free software since the 1980s

Available for consulting engagements.
